item.paragraph:
Soong MD, Derrick L: PERFORM
Event Display: PEDS Outpt Clinic Note
Authored Date: 20250428173220-0700

Assessment/Plan
_
1. ADHD F90.9
Given the new diagnoses
Do not feel like medications are warranted and side effects may outweigh benefits.
Advised parent behavioral training, have provided resources to Mom.
Advised structure is very important.
Discussed continuing to work with him, but seems like he is doing better than his sister
Can come back and discuss anytime.
2. Dyslexia R48.0
See above
3. Anxiety F41.9
See above
Patient consented to a virtual visit and was seen today via:
[x] Televideo visit: Synchronous, real-time interactive, secure HIPAA compliant, audio-video functionality was used to conduct all or the majority of the visit.
[_] Audio-only visit: Synchronous, real-time interactive, audio-only technology was used to conduct all or the majority of the visit. More than 10 minutes spent in medical discussion with the patient. (Must spend more than 10 minutes in medical discussion to bill an audio-only visit).
Provider's Location of Practice (i.e. Distant Site): Virginia Mason
Patient’s Location (i.e. Originating Site): [x] Home or [_] Other:
Other family members, caregivers, etc. with the patient at time of visit: [_] None or [x] Other: Parent
I have spent 20 minutes on today’s visit, including visit time with the patient, review of records, and coordination of care. Reference: _
Chief Complaint
Neuropsych eval
History of Present Illness
Laurence had a neuropsych eval and was diagnosed with ADHD, Anxiety, Dyslexia, and dysgraphia
Dad is not too worried about Laurence.
Mom feels like he has a lot of energy and seems more disorganized and has some issues with emotional dysregulation
Mom wondering if medications may be beneficial.
mom also wondering what other things can be done.
Review of Systems
Pertinent systems reviewed and negative except as per HPI
Physical Exam
Pt not present
External Vitals & Measurements
No qualifying data available.
Growth Percentiles
No qualifying data available.
Hearing and Vision Screenings
No qualifying data available.
Problem List/Past Medical History
Ongoing
ADHD
Anxiety
Asthma
Birth mark Comments: forehead
Chromosomal microduplication
Dyslexia
Hemangioma
Prematurity
Strabismus
Underweight in childhood
Historical
No qualifying data
Medications
Albuterol (Eqv-ProAir HFA) 90 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol, 2 puff(s), ORAL INH, Q6 Hours, PRN
albuterol CFC free 90 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol, 2 puff(s), ORAL INH, Q4 Hours, PRN, 1 refills
Qvar Redihaler 40 mcg/inh inhalation aerosol, 80 mcg= 2 puff(s), ORAL INH, BID
Spacer for MDI, 1 EA, ORAL INH, ONCE
Vitamin D, Daily
Allergies
NKA
Social History
Home/Environment
Lives with Father, Mother, Siblings, Grandmother.
Family History
Allergies: Mother and Father.
Anxiety: Mother.
Depression: Mother.
Diabetes mellitus type 2: Sister.
Eczema: Father and Pat. GFather.
Health Maintenance
Pending (in the next year)
There are no current recommendations pending
Due In Future
Ped - well child check not due until 03/05/26 and every 1 year(s)
Satisfied (in the past 1 year)
Satisfied
Ped - well child check on 03/05/25. Satisfied by Soong MD, Derrick L
(Electronically Signed on 04/28/25 05:32 PM)
Soong MD, Derrick L
